application_credentials.description:
Follow the [instructions]({more_info_url}) to create OAuth2 credentials for Gmail API access:
1. Go to [Credentials]({oauth_creds_url}) and create an **OAuth client ID**.
2. Set Application Type to **Web application**.
3. Configure the [OAuth consent screen]({oauth_consent_url}) with scope `gmail.readonly`.

auth.title: Connect Gmail
auth.description: Authorize Shop2Parcel to read your Gmail inbox so it can detect Shopify shipping confirmation emails. Only read access is requested.

finish.title: Configure Shop2Parcel
finish.description: Enter your parcelapp.net API key and choose a name for this integration entry.

data_description.api_key: Found in the parcelapp app under Settings > API.
data_description.name: A name to identify this integration entry (e.g. "Shop2Parcel (you@gmail.com)").

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authorize Gmail
reauth_confirm.description: Your Gmail authorization has expired or been revoked. Click below to re-authorize Shop2Parcel.

user.title: Connect Shop2Parcel
user.description: Choose how to connect to your email account. You can add multiple accounts by running setup again.

data_description.connection_type: Select 'Gmail OAuth2' to connect via Google OAuth2, or 'IMAP' to connect via IMAP with username and password (app password).

imap.title: Configure IMAP Account
imap.description: Enter your IMAP server credentials. Use an app password if your provider requires two-factor authentication.

data_description.imap_port: 993 for SSL, 143 for STARTTLS or unencrypted.
data_description.imap_password: Your email password or app-specific password.

reauth_confirm_imap.title: Re-enter IMAP Credentials
reauth_confirm_imap.description: IMAP authentication failed. Please re-enter your password.

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid parcelapp.net API key. Check the key in parcelapp Settings and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to parcelapp.net. Check your network connection and try again.
error.oauth_error: Google authorization failed. Please try again.
error.invalid_auth: IMAP authentication failed. Check username and password.
error.imap_cannot_connect: Could not connect to the IMAP server. Check hostname, port, and TLS mode.

abort.already_configured: Shop2Parcel is already configured for this Gmail account.
abort.already_configured_imap: An account with this username and host is already configured.
abort.wrong_account: Wrong account: please authenticate with the original Gmail account.

reauth_required.title: Shop2Parcel: Gmail access expired
reauth_required.description: Shop2Parcel: Gmail access expired. Click to re-authorize.
